DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871
One or more may be inoperative or missing provided that:

ListItem.Para: The associated seat is considered inoperative and not used, and
Inoperative lifevest is placarded inoperative or removed from the installed location and placed out of sight so it cannot be mistaken for a functional unit, and
Required distribution of operative lifevests is maintained, and
One life vest is available for each occupant.

Note.Para: The lifvest covered by this MEL item includes the passenger lifevests (274), cockpit crew lifevests (4), cabin crew lifevests (14) and spare lifevests (7).

DispatchCondition.Title: One not available for each occupant

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871
One or more may be inoperative or missing provided that:

ListItem.Para: Operations at a distance of more than 50 NM from the shore are not conducted, and
There is no risk of ditching during takeoff and landing.

Note.Para: The lifvest covered by this MEL item includes the passenger lifevests (274), cockpit crew lifevests (4), cabin crew lifevests (14) and spare lifevests (7).

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One or more may be inoperative or missing provided that:

ListItem.Para: The associated seat is considered inoperative and not used, and
Inoperative lifevest is placarded inoperative or removed from the installed location and placed out of sight so it cannot be mistaken for a functional unit, and
Required distribution of operative lifevests is maintained, and
One life vest is available for each occupant.

Note.Para: The lifvest covered by this MEL item includes the passenger lifevests (311), cockpit crew lifevests (4), cabin crew lifevests (12) and spare lifevests (7)

DispatchCondition.Title: One not available for each occupant

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One or more may be inoperative or missing provided that:

ListItem.Para: Operations at a distance of more than 50 NM from the shore are not conducted, and
There is no risk of ditching during takeoff and landing.

Note.Para: The lifvest covered by this MEL item includes the passenger lifevests (311), cockpit crew lifevests (4), cabin crew lifevests (12) and spare lifevests (7)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-872, VN-A873 ,VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879
One or more may be inoperative or missing provided that:

ListItem.Para: The associated seat is considered inoperative and not used, and
Inoperative lifevest is placarded inoperative or removed from the installed location and placed out of sight so it cannot be mistaken for a functional unit, and
Required distribution of operative lifevests is maintained, and
One life vest is available for each occupant.

Note.Para: The lifvest covered by this MEL item includes the passenger lifevests (367), cockpit crew lifevests (4), cabin crew lifevests (13) and spare lifevests (7)

DispatchCondition.Title: One not available for each occupant

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-872, VN-A873 ,VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879
One or more may be inoperative or missing provided that:

ListItem.Para: Operations at a distance of more than 50 NM from the shore are not conducted, and
There is no risk of ditching during takeoff and landing.

Note.Para: The lifvest covered by this MEL item includes the passenger lifevests (367), cockpit crew lifevests (4), cabin crew lifevests (13) and spare lifevests (7)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: For VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868,VN-A870, VN-A871.
Applicable to: VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879.
One or more may be missing or inoperative, provided the number of operative life vest and safety belt must be sufficient for infant(s) carried on board.
